notes: Public MSL float surface compiled; still needs AIR review to split native from lowered.
Public MSL half surface compiled; timing remains a host-visible dispatch proxy.
Public MSL bfloat surface compiled on this machine; keep classification honest until AIR/native lowering is separated.
Public MSL int surface compiled.
Packed 16-bit signed surface compiled through public MSL short.
Public MSL uint surface compiled.
Packed 16-bit unsigned surface compiled through public MSL ushort.
Packed 8-bit signed surface compiled through public MSL char.
Public MSL long surface compiled; native-vs-lowered still needs AIR/disassembly evidence.
Packed 8-bit unsigned surface compiled through public MSL uchar.
Public MSL ulong surface compiled; native-vs-lowered still needs AIR/disassembly evidence.
No public MSL int4 scalar exists; this kernel uses signed nibble quantization as an honest packed proxy.
No public MSL uint4 scalar exists; this kernel uses unsigned nibble quantization as an honest packed proxy.
No public MSL FP4 scalar exists; this kernel uses a 2e1m-style minifloat proxy without microscaling.
No public MSL TF32 scalar exists; this kernel uses mantissa truncation as an honest TF32-style proxy.
No public MSL FP8 e4m3 scalar exists; this is a software minifloat proxy.
No public MSL FP8 e5m2 scalar exists; this is a software minifloat proxy.
MXFP8 is approximated as threadgroup-scale microscaling plus FP8 e4m3-style quantization.
MXINT8 is approximated as threadgroup-scale quantize/dequantize with signed int8 range.
MXFP6 is approximated as threadgroup-scale microscaling plus a 3e2m-style minifloat proxy.
MXFP4 is approximated as threadgroup-scale microscaling plus a 2e1m-style minifloat proxy.
